title: Idea Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter in every <ideas_dir>/<id>/<id>.md file. Raw or evolving thoughts that may be promoted to a concept, workflow, or project.

id.description: Snake_case ID matching the folder name under ideas_dir

title.description: Short, punchy name for the idea

created_at.description: ISO 8601 date when the idea was first captured

promoted_to.description: [[wikilink]] to the concept or workflow this idea became. Only set when status is 'promoted'.

related_concepts.description: [[wikilink]] references to concept nodes this idea connects to

sources.description: [[wikilink]] references to source nodes that inspired this idea

effort.description: Rough size estimate to explore or implement this idea

motivation.description: One sentence on why this idea is worth pursuing
